data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for inspector re-verification and sign-off.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Inspector re-verification and sign-off' but lacks concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The evidence provided primarily consists of a use case summary, which does not demonstrate that the system can perform the required inspector verification and sign-off as specified. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or functionality for inspector re-verification and sign-off.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the inspector re-verification and sign-off requirement.
